plugins.name: TickTick Focus
plugins.author: Narlei Moreira
plugins.description: Unofficial, independent plugin — not affiliated with or endorsed by TickTick. Control and mirror your TickTick focus/pomodoro from a single smart button. Start a 25-minute focus, pause/resume with the same click, and start the 5-minute break when focus ends. Detects focus started or paused on another device and shows the live remaining time (MM:SS) on your Ulanzi Deck. Your data stays private: only a session token is stored locally, and the plugin talks directly to TickTick — never to a third-party server.
plugins.longDescription: Unofficial, independent plugin — not affiliated with or endorsed by TickTick. Control and mirror your TickTick focus/pomodoro from a single smart button. Start a 25-minute focus, pause/resume with the same click, and start the 5-minute break when focus ends. Detects focus started or paused on another device and shows the live remaining time (MM:SS) on your Ulanzi Deck. Your data stays private: only a session token is stored locally, and the plugin talks directly to TickTick — never to a third-party server.

en.description: Unofficial, independent plugin — not affiliated with or endorsed by TickTick. Control and mirror your TickTick focus/pomodoro from a single smart button. Start a 25-minute focus, pause/resume with the same click, and start the 5-minute break when focus ends. Detects focus started or paused on another device and shows the live remaining time (MM:SS) on your Ulanzi Deck. pt_BR.name: Foco do TickTick
pt_BR.description: Plugin não oficial e independente — sem afiliação ou endosso do TickTick. Controle e reflita o foco/pomodoro do TickTick a partir de um único botão inteligente. Inicie um foco de 25 minutos, pause/continue com o mesmo clique e inicie o relax de 5 minutos ao terminar. Detecta foco iniciado ou pausado em outro aparelho e mostra o tempo restante ao vivo (MM:SS) no seu Ulanzi Deck. Seus dados ficam privados: só o token de sessão é guardado localmente, e o plugin fala direto com o TickTick — nunca com um servidor de terceiros.

zh_CN.name: TickTick 专注
zh_CN.description: 非官方独立插件——与 TickTick 无任何关联或认可关系。通过一个智能按钮控制并映射你的 TickTick 专注/番茄钟。开始 25 分钟的专注，同一次点击即可暂停/继续，专注结束时开始 5 分钟休息。可检测到在其他设备上开始或暂停的专注，并在 Ulanzi Deck 上实时显示剩余时间（MM:SS）。你的数据始终保密：本地仅保存会话令牌，插件直接与 TickTick 通信——绝不经过第三方服务器。

zh_HK.name: TickTick 專注
zh_HK.description: 非官方獨立外掛程式——與 TickTick 沒有任何關聯或認可關係。透過一個智慧按鈕控制並反映你的 TickTick 專注/番茄鐘。開始 25 分鐘的專注，同一次點擊即可暫停/繼續，專注結束時開始 5 分鐘休息。可偵測到在其他裝置上開始或暫停的專注，並在 Ulanzi Deck 上即時顯示剩餘時間（MM:SS）。你的資料始終保密：本機只會儲存工作階段權杖，外掛程式直接與 TickTick 通訊——絕不經過第三方伺服器。

plugins.changelog:
## TickTick Focus v1.0.0

First release — a single smart **Focus** button for your Ulanzi Deck that controls and mirrors your TickTick focus/pomodoro timer.

- **Start** a focus session (default 25 min) with one click.
- **Pause / resume** an in-progress focus with the same click.
- When focus ends, the button offers **Relax 5'?** — click to start the break.
- **Mirrors** focus started or paused on another device (Mac, phone) within ~30 s.
- Shows the **live remaining time (MM:SS)** with a progress ring.

### Sign in with one click

Click **Sign in to TickTick** in the button settings — a small native window (macOS
WebKit, no Chromium, no download) opens the real TickTick login page. Log in however
you like (password, Google/Apple, captcha, 2FA); the session token is captured
automatically and saved. Nothing but the token is stored, and it persists across
restarts. If it ever expires, the button shows ↻ — just sign in again. A manual
paste-token fallback is available under *Advanced*.

### Install

```bash
/bin/bash -c "$(curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/narlei/ulanzideck-ticktick/main/install.sh)"
```

plugins.name: AI Cost Monitor
plugins.author: Narlei Moreira
plugins.description: Show how much you spend on AI coding tools (Claude, Codex, Cursor, Gemini, Copilot and more) right on your Ulanzi Deck. One button per platform plus a Total. Cost data is read locally — no API keys needed. Cost calculation powered by the open-source codeburn (MIT).
plugins.longDescription: Show how much you spend on AI coding tools (Claude, Codex, Cursor, Gemini, Copilot and more) right on your Ulanzi Deck. One button per platform plus a Total. Cost data is read locally — no API keys needed. Cost calculation powered by the open-source codeburn (MIT).

en.name: AI Cost Monitor
en.description: Show how much you spend on AI coding tools (Claude, Codex, Cursor, Gemini, Copilot and more) right on your Ulanzi Deck. One button per platform plus a Total. Cost data is read locally — no API keys needed. Cost calculation powered by the open-source codeburn (MIT).

pt_BR.name: AI Cost Monitor
pt_BR.description: Veja direto no seu Ulanzi Deck quanto você gasta com ferramentas de IA para programar (Claude, Codex, Cursor, Gemini, Copilot e mais). Um botão por plataforma e um Total. Os dados de custo são lidos localmente — sem chaves de API. Cálculo de custo com tecnologia do projeto open-source codeburn (MIT).

zh_CN.name: AI Cost Monitor
zh_CN.description: 在 Ulanzi Deck 上直接查看你在 AI 编程工具（Claude、Codex、Cursor、Gemini、Copilot 等）上的花费。每个平台一个按键，外加一个合计（Total）。花费数据在本地读取——无需 API 密钥。花费计算由开源项目 codeburn（MIT）提供支持。

plugins.changelog:
## Install

```bash
/bin/bash -c "$(curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/narlei/ulanzideck-ai-cost/main/install.sh)"
```

One command. No configuration files. No API keys.

> **Requirements:** macOS · [Ulanzi Studio](https://www.ulanzi.com/pages/download) · Node.js ≥ 22 (`brew install node`)

---

## What it does

AI Cost Monitor puts your AI coding spend on a physical button — always visible, no app switching, no dashboards.

Drag a button to your deck, pick a platform and time period, and you're done.

**Supported platforms:** Claude · Codex · Cursor · Gemini · Copilot · Aider · Windsurf · Continue · and more

**Without a spend limit** — shows the dollar amount in the platform's brand color.

**With a spend limit** — the button becomes a live progress bar that fills as you spend, shifting from green → yellow → orange → red as you approach the limit.

All cost data is read **locally** from your AI tools' session files. Nothing leaves your machine.

---

## Powered by

Cost calculation is powered by **[codeburn](https://github.com/getagentseal/codeburn)** (MIT) — reads AI session files and calculates spend using LiteLLM pricing data.

plugins.name: Claude Code Usage
plugins.author: Narlei Moreira
plugins.description: Monitor your Claude Code subscription usage in real time. Shows the 5-hour rolling limit and the weekly limit (all models) directly on your Ulanzi Deck button, with color-coded thresholds and reset countdown. Credentials are read securely from the macOS Keychain — no API key required.
plugins.longDescription: Monitor your Claude Code subscription usage in real time. Shows the 5-hour rolling limit and the weekly limit (all models) directly on your Ulanzi Deck button, with color-coded thresholds and reset countdown. Credentials are read securely from the macOS Keychain — no API key required.

en.name: Claude Code Usage
en.description: Monitor your Claude Code subscription usage in real time. Shows the 5-hour rolling limit and the weekly limit (all models) directly on your Ulanzi Deck button, with color-coded thresholds and reset countdown. Credentials are read securely from the macOS Keychain — no API key required.

pt_BR.name: Uso do Claude Code
pt_BR.description: Monitore o uso da sua assinatura do Claude Code em tempo real. Mostra o limite móvel de 5 horas e o limite semanal (todos os modelos) direto no botão do seu Ulanzi Deck, com faixas de cores e contagem regressiva para o reset. As credenciais são lidas com segurança do Keychain do macOS — sem necessidade de chave de API.

zh_CN.name: Claude Code 用量
zh_CN.description: 在 Ulanzi Deck 上实时监控你的 Claude Code 订阅用量。显示 5 小时滚动限额和每周总限额（所有模型），按钮带有颜色阈值和重置倒计时。凭证安全地从 macOS 钥匙串读取——无需 API 密钥。

zh_HK.name: Claude Code 用量
zh_HK.description: 在 Ulanzi Deck 上即時監控你的 Claude Code 訂閱用量。顯示 5 小時滾動限額和每週總限額（所有模型），按鈕帶有顏色閾值和重置倒數。憑證安全地從 macOS 鑰匙圈讀取——無需 API 金鑰。

plugins.changelog:
## What's new?

- **Multilingual support.** The property inspector now displays in your system language. Supported languages: English, 简体中文, 繁體中文, 日本語, 한국어, Deutsch, Français, Español, and Português (Brasil). Falls back to English for unsupported locales.

## 1.0.3

- **Fixed the Weekly Limit display during rate limiting.** When Claude returns a 429, only the metric that was actually rejected now shows the "stopped" state — the other key keeps showing its real utilization and reset countdown instead of going blank.

## Installation

**Requirements:** macOS, Ulanzi Studio 3.0.11+, and Claude Code CLI signed in (`claude auth login`).

1. Download `com.claude.usage.ulanziPlugin.zip` below
2. Unzip and move the folder into:
   ```
   ~/Library/Application Support/Ulanzi/UlanziDeck/Plugins/
   ```
3. Quit and reopen Ulanzi Studio
4. Drag **5-hour Limit** or **Weekly Limit** from the **Claude Code** category onto a key

That's it — the button updates every 5 minutes. Click it any time to force a refresh.
